title: Onepie
description: Set sail in the blocky seas with the One Piece Minecraft Modpack! Dive into a thrilling adventure inspired by the world of One Piece, and pls leave a like!
body:
This modpack combines the spirit of Eiichiro Oda's epic tale with Minecraft's endless creativity.

- Devil Fruits: Discover and consume Devil Fruits to gain unique powers like controlling fire, ice, or rubber-like abilities. But beware of the ocean's curse!
- Epic Ships: Build and customize your pirate ship to explore vast oceans and islands filled with treasure, secrets, and danger.
- Iconic Characters: Encounter NPCs modeled after beloved characters, such as Luffy, Zoro, and Nami, to team up with or fight against.
- Custom Combat: Engage in thrilling battles using swords, haki abilities, and Devil Fruit powers.
- Pirate Crews and Factions: Join forces with friends or NPCs to create your own crew, wage wars, and climb the pirate rankings.
  Embark on your journey to become the Pirate King today! What kind of pirate will you be?

corpse mod
